sourceRef.citation: Kourovka Notebook, Problem 17.16 (Khukhro & Mazurov eds., ed.17)

statement.latex: Let$A$be an Artin group of finite type, that is, the corresponding Coxeter group is finite. It is known that the group$A$is linear (S.\,Bigelow, J.~Amer. Math.
